title: questions
wikitext:
[]: questions             Quote Post by Hand of God » Sun Apr 24, 2005 9:18 pm what is the dead sea scrolls?

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Sun Apr 24, 2005 9:31 pm AHH GOD... ok just think of them as religious prophecies incorperated into eva. because they sounded like a good idea to help create an intricate plot. you could also just look them up on any search engine. well someone else will probably post after me describing the whole deal ; so without further adieu...

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Mon Apr 25, 2005 10:22 am how amusing....

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Apr 25, 2005 10:27 am HO hum the scrolls inrelation to eva are sectret texts that tell of the comming fo the angels and the impacts. The original source of information the lead to descovering adam unde the ice etc. I thats the reall intent to your post I'm sorry about my google nazi friends over their. If you wanted use to type out the basic history of what they are in real life, hang on a sec. Reichu sick-um ! > watches in morbid intrest as Reichus creations go to work<

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Mon Apr 25, 2005 6:05 pm thanx to the only dadude, I have anopther question why are ther soooooo many tombstombs where yui tombstomb is and why antartica´s water is red after the second impact, also what is the first impact?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Apr 25, 2005 7:13 pm Hand of God wrote: thanx to the only dadude, I have anopther question why are ther soooooo many tombstombs where yui tombstomb is and why antartica´s water is red after the second impact, also what is the first impact?

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Mon Apr 25, 2005 7:17 pm thnx your anwser brings me to another question what exactly is lcl?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Apr 25, 2005 7:37 pm (beats hand of god over the head repeatedly with metal baseball bat) Yeah I know I should have used a bageutte.... Anyway to answer that question lcl is described as being something simialer to the primordial soup life came from.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Apr 25, 2005 8:57 pm thewayneiac wrote: There are a lot of tombstones there because it is a cemetary. The water is red because all living things in Antarctica turned into LCL including billions of micro-organisms. First impact was when Lilith and Adam crashed to earth billions of years ago resulting in the creation of the moon.

[]:             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Mon Apr 25, 2005 9:56 pm the water is blood red for the same reason as in eoe. and as for the graves, half of the world's population died due to the second impact - thus, many dead bodies to shove 6 ft. under

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Apr 25, 2005 11:11 pm For the love of Lilith, people, don't get yourselves started. It's, like, so not worth it.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Apr 25, 2005 11:18 pm Actually Antartica is full of life as any other place on the planet. Different life, but life. On the coast of course, don't know much of what happens in the middle of the continent.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Apr 25, 2005 11:45 pm AAAAKKKK!!!! *pulls out long luxurious Motoko hair*

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Apr 25, 2005 11:49 pm Weee! Once again, I doubt the seals and whales along the coast of Antarctica could produce enough LCL to cover the entire South Pole. I think Adam was using some of his S2 Mojo when he went to berserk to make sure he fucked up as much of the planet as possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Apr 26, 2005 6:00 am Dave wrote: Weee! Once again, I doubt the seals and whales along the coast of Antarctica could produce enough LCL to cover the entire South Pole. I think Adam was using some of his S2 Mojo when he went to berserk to make sure he fucked up as much of the planet as possible.

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Apr 26, 2005 10:31 am your also underestimating the size of adam itself. if it inploded/ exploded/ minimized etc. it would of had a hell of a lot of lcl/ blood to spray out. just look at the amount lilith churns out in central dogma

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 26, 2005 12:46 pm First off -- I have never heard a good reason why LCL mysteriously becomes red for the Impacts, when it is clearly amber-colored every other time. Second -- Adam is not the source of carbon-based life, so why would ve produce LCL (the stuff from which carbon-based lifeforms originated)? Certainly, Adam would not reduce into it, being made of a completely different type of matter. Also, Adam is really not all THAT big, unless ve gained an exponential amount of mass for 2I a la GNR.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Apr 26, 2005 12:48 pm GNR?
